intro: Gerascanthus borinquensis, also known as Borinquen tree or Puerto Rico tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Gerascanthus borinquensis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
